title: MBA / PGDM Jobs 2026 – Executive Assistant to Director
shortInfo: CMD Kerala Recruitment 2026 notification out for 1 Executive Assistant to Director post. Apply online through the official website on or before 08 June 2026.

basic_details.job_title: CMD Kerala Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Executive Assistant to Director post
basic_details.short_information: CMD Kerala Recruitment 2026 notification out for 1 Executive Assistant to Director post. Apply online through the official website on or before 08 June 2026.

age_limit.details: Candidates who are interested in applying for the CMD Kerala Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form.

qualification.education_qualification: Regular MBA/ MCA / B.Tech (Any discipline) from a reputed institution, Company Secretaryship from ICSI
qualification.details: Regular MBA/ MCA / B.Tech (Any discipline) from a reputed institution Or Company Secretaryship from ICSI

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 08-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of CMD Kerala to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for the Executive Assistant to Director post?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the Executive Assistant to Director position at CMD Kerala is June 8, 2026. Ensure your application is submitted well before this deadline.

faq.question: What are the educational qualifications required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Regular MBA/ MCA / B.Tech (Any discipline) from a reputed institution or Company Secretaryship from ICSI to be eligible for the Executive Assistant to Director role.

faq.question: What is the age limit for the Executive Assistant to Director position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for applicants applying for the Executive Assistant to Director post is 40 years. There are no specified minimum age limits mentioned.

faq.question: Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive by CMD Kerala.

faq.question: What is the salary offered for the Executive Assistant to Director post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Executive Assistant to Director position will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 30,000 per month.

faq.question: How many vacancies are available for the Executive Assistant to Director post?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy available for the Executive Assistant to Director post in the Centre for Management Development (CMD Kerala).

faq.question: What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Executive Assistant to Director recruitment will involve a Proficiency Test followed by an Interview.

faq.question: What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The recruitment for the Executive Assistant to Director post is on a contract basis.

faq.question: Where is the Centre for Management Development located?
faq.answer: The Centre for Management Development (CMD Kerala) is located in Thiruvananthapuram, Kerala, with the pincode 695014.

faq.question: Can candidates apply offline for this position?
faq.answer: No, applications for the Executive Assistant to Director post must be submitted online only through the official website or the provided application link.

seo_tags: Centre for Management Development Executive Assistant to Director Recruitment 2026
